name: EJB Bad Practices: Use of Class Loader
description: An Enterprise JavaBean attempts to create or obtain a class loader, violating the EJB specification. This can compromise security by allowing the bean to bypass container-managed class loading and potentially load unauthorized or malicious classes.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node within an EJB context that invokes class loader operations via EXTERNAL calls. Look for calls to ClassLoader constructors, Thread.getContextClassLoader(), or Class.getClassLoader() within bean code.
